backend.changelog: The Stop button on the Generate progress bar is now always clickable while a run is in progress, so you can cancel a long or runaway Generate. (Pairs with CadBridge 1.8.58, which stops large assemblies from keeping every part open at once.)

cadBridge.changelog: Virtual components (parts 'Made Virtual' inside an assembly) now reliably export STEP and 3D PDF, including on a freshly-downloaded cache. Such a part has no standalone file on the platform, so Generate now produces its outputs from the live copy SolidWorks holds while the parent assembly is open. Also removes a ~20-second stall and two error dialogs that appeared when Generate tried to open a virtual component directly by id. Supersedes 1.8.59; recommended.
